channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: 2027: Ex-SGF Babachir warns Nigerians against voting Atiku
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Former SGF Babachir Lawal warns Nigerians against voting Atiku Abubakar in the 2027 presidential election, citing ethnic politics. Atiku denies allegations
Read More: https://punchng.com/2027-ex-sgf-babachir-warns-nigerians-against-voting-atiku/

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Paul Rowley has stepped down as St Helens coach with immediate effect.

item.title: Police arrest man caught selling stolen N2m block machine in A’Ibom
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Akwa Ibom State Police have arrested Emmanuel Etim for selling a stolen N2m block machine vibrator and Nsidibe Benson for vandalising polytechnic property.

item.title: Arsenal interested in Stones, Konsa after Saliba injury blow
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Arsenal hold an interest in John Stones and Ezri Konsa as they look to sign a centre-back this summer following news of an extended period on the sidelines for William Saliba.

item.title: Why do Chelsea want to sign Lacroix from Palace?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Chelsea have not paid a transfer fee for a player aged 26 or over since the summer of 2022 with the ill-fated acquisitions of Raheem Sterling and Kalidou Koulibaly. But Crystal Palace’s Maxence Lacroix is a player worth relaxing the policy for.

item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria

item.title: Brent oil nears $100 after surging 5% on Mideast attacks
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The price of main international oil contract, Brent North Sea, soared five percent Thursday after Houthi rebels claimed to have struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea. The post Brent oil nears $100 after surging 5% on Mideast attacks appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Nigeria: Who inherited Ike Ekweremadu’s political machine in Enugu?
item.dc:creator: The Africa Report
item.description: Four years after his London arrest, Ike Ekweremadu’s political apparatus no longer operates as a unified bloc. With Peter Obi mounting an opposition challenge, governor Peter Mbah is racing to consolidate South East votes ahead of 2027.

The Committee also ordered th

item.title: Airtel Money processes $61.4bn in Q2 transactions ahead of planned IPO
item.dc:creator: Technext
item.description: Airtel Africa has announced that its mobile money operation, Airtel Money, processed transactions worth $61.4 billion. This comes…

item.title: Victoria Plc Wins Support for Debt Deal After HSBC U-Turn
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Troubled UK carpetmaker Victoria Plc secured enough bondholder support for a consensual debt restructuring after HSBC Holdings Plc backed the plan at the last minute, averting a costlier, more time-consuming court process.

item.title: Airtel Africa Plc reports $360 million pre-tax profit in Q1 2026
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Airtel Africa Plc reported a profit before tax of $360 million for the quarter ended 30 June 2026, compared with $273 million in the prior period. The post Airtel Africa Plc reports $360 million pre-tax profit in Q1 2026 appeared first on Nairametrics.

item.title: My past criticisms of Tinubu weren’t lies – Bwala
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Presidential spokesman Daniel Bwala has defended his previous criticisms of President Bola Tinubu, saying they should no longer dominate public discourse because they are now "baseless" in light of current realities, while insisting they were never false. The post My past criticisms of Tinubu weren&

item.title: US and Saudi Arabia reach a multi-billion dollar civilian nuclear deal
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The United States announced that it had reached a civilian nuclear cooperation deal with Saudi Arabia. Energy Secretary Chris Wright signed the pact and a separate bilateral safeguards deal alongside Saudi Energy Minister Prince Abdulaziz bin Salman. There have been years of discussions even under

item.title: How Peller and Jarvis Turned Their Wedding Into Nigeria’s Biggest Creator Event
item.dc:creator: YNaija
item.description: The release of Habeeb ‘Peller’ Hamzat and Elizabeth ‘Jarvis’ Amadou’s official pre-wedding photos marked the latest high-production drop in a carefully calculated media rollout. Ahead of their August 1 ceremony, the TikTok creators treated the photo shoot less as a quiet romantic keepsake and more a

item.title: Chinese digital assets company Cregis targets Nigeria, Kenya and South Africa in new expansion drive
item.dc:creator: Technext
item.description: China-based digital assets infrastructure company Cregis is expanding into Africa. This was disclosed in a statement by the…

item.title: The late James Van Der Beek’s former Beverly Hills home up for rent for $13,950 a month
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Late “Dawson’s Creek” star James Van Der Beek’s former Beverly Hills home has been offered up for rent—five months after the actor died following a battle with cancer.

item.title: I will definitely claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”

item.title: BlackRock Says Elevated Yields Offer Bond Investors a Cushion
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: US Treasuries are offering investors solid protection against losses as yields remain elevated, according to BlackRock Inc.

item.title: Fashion Designer Veekee James Reveals Advice Her Mum Gave Her That Helped Shape Her Path To Success
item.dc:creator: SDK Celeb
item.description: Nigerian fashion designer, Veekee James recently spoke about how her mother raised her and her brothers alone after their father died. Veekee said she lost her dad when she was about five years old and Her mother decided not to remarry or date anyone but focused completely on taking care of her chi

item.title: Bukayo Saka Has Been Added To The YNaija Masterlist
item.dc:creator: YNaija
item.description: Bukayo Ayoyinka Temidayo Saka is a 24-year-old British-Nigerian footballer who plays as a right winger for the Premier League club Arsenal and as a player representing the England national team. Bukayo began his football career as a teenager playing in the Arsenal U16 team before signing a professio

item.title: Replay: Marco Rubio addresses Middle East and Ukraine conflicts
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Rewatch as US Secretary of State Marco Rubio addresses the conflicts in the Middle East and Ukraine at the end of the ASEAN summit in Manilla.
